# Pradumna Saraf

> Personal website of Pradumna Saraf with technical writing, projects, speaking, and profile information.

## Canonical

- https://pradumnasaraf.dev/

## Primary Content

- Blog: https://pradumnasaraf.dev/blog
- Projects: https://pradumnasaraf.dev/projects
- Speaking: https://pradumnasaraf.dev/speaking
- Toolkit: https://pradumnasaraf.dev/toolkit
- Timeline: https://pradumnasaraf.dev/timeline
- CV: https://pradumnasaraf.dev/cv
- Links: https://pradumnasaraf.dev/links
- Photography: https://pradumnasaraf.dev/photography

## Feeds And Discovery

- Sitemap index: https://pradumnasaraf.dev/sitemap-index.xml
- XML sitemap: https://pradumnasaraf.dev/sitemap.xml
- RSS feed: https://pradumnasaraf.dev/rss.xml

## Notes

- The main authored long-form content is published under `/blog`.
- Some reposted articles may point to an external canonical URL.
- The `/contact` route opens an email client and is not intended to be indexed as a content page.
